beginner.title: Sum of Two Numbers
beginner.description: Write a program to take two numbers as input and print their sum.

beginner.title: Check Even or Odd
beginner.description: Write a program to check if a given number is even or odd.

beginner.title: Simple Interest Calculator
beginner.description: Given principal (P), rate (R), and time (T), calculate simple interest (P*R*T/100).

intermediate.title: Reverse a String
intermediate.description: Write a function to reverse a given string.

intermediate.title: Find Largest Number
intermediate.description: Write a function to find the largest of three numbers.

intermediate.title: Sum of Digits
intermediate.description: Write a function to return the sum of digits of a number.

advanced.title: Fibonacci Number
advanced.description: Write a function to print the Nth Fibonacci number.

advanced.title: Palindrome String
advanced.description: Check if a given string is a palindrome.

advanced.title: Matrix Row Sum
advanced.description: Given a matrix, print the sum of each row.
